Title: Crous, J. Willem
Overview: Art historian of the classical era. Remained at the DAI in Rome during the Nazi-ideologue period 1936-43.
Selected Bibliography: Florentiner Waffenpfeiler & Armilustrium. Deutsches Archaeol. Inst. Röm. Abt., 1933; Konkordanz zum Corpus vasorum antiquorum. Rome: M. Bretschneider, 1942, i.e. 1943.
Sources: Encyclopedia of the History of Classical Archaeology. Nancy Thomson de Grummond, ed. Westport, CT: Greenwood Press, 1996, p. 493, mentioned.
